summary: Frontend-only smoke test of MARAN Atelier SPA. All 12 primary user flows passed, 0 console errors. Desktop (1365x768) and mobile (390x844) both rendered correctly.
passed: Page loads at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL with 0 JS console errors and full SPA renders (Header/Hero/Services/Portfolio/Stats/About/Contact/Footer)
Sticky header becomes glassmorphic on scroll (class changes after ~200px scroll)
Header 'Book Consultation' CTA scrolls to #contact section (contact top ~28px from viewport)
Hero indicators 0/1/2 clickable and switch slides
Services renovation & landscape cards render with data-testids
Before/After slider responds to keyboard ArrowRight
Stats counter (stat-villas) shows animated value '500+ Villas Transformed'
Contact form validation: empty submit shows name/email/message inline errors
Contact form success: valid submission clears the form (simulated success)
Contact info links present: tel:, wa.me, and mailto: hrefs all exist
Floating consultation CTA appears after scroll >640px, links to https://wa.me/971505550198
Mobile viewport 390x844: hamburger toggle opens mobile-menu drawer with all nav links and CTA
notes: Contact form submission is MOCKED (simulated setTimeout success, no network call) as per requirements. No backend endpoints tested per request.
